title: Pico de Gallo
description: Simple fresh salsa — tomato, red onion, jalapeño, cilantro, lime. Ready in 10 minutes, best after 20 minutes of rest. Use as a topping for bowls, tacos, eggs, or anything.

ingredients.name: jalapeño, seeds removed for less heat, minced

instructions: Dice tomatoes, red onion, and jalapeño. Roughly chop cilantro.
Combine everything in a bowl. Squeeze lime juice over, season with salt, and stir to combine.
Let rest at least 20 minutes before serving — the flavors develop significantly as it sits.
notes: Leave jalapeño seeds in for more heat. Keeps refrigerated for 2–3 days, though it gets more watery over time — drain briefly before using if made ahead.
